select t1.* from (select 
ap.Id
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.AssessmentId
,ap.Response
,ap.Comment
,ap.RecommendedHours
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
 INNER JOIN dbo.ABADosageAssessment aa ON ap.AssessmentId = aa.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON aa.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_ABADosageAssessmentAgreement t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  ap.Id,ap.DateCreated,ap.DateLastModified,ap.DateDeleted,ap.ChildProfileId,ap.AssessmentId,ap.QuestionId,ap.OptionId,ap.Comment	
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap inner join  dbo.ABADosageAssessmentAgreement ag on (ap.AssessmentId=ag.id  )
inner join dbo.ABADosageAssessment aa on ( ap.AssessmentId=aa.id) 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (aa.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_ABADosageAssessmentResponses t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[AccountsToDelete]') AND type in (N'U'))
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE dbo.AccountsToDelete (
        AccountId INT NOT NULL,
        Source VARCHAR(50) NULL,  
        DateInserted DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(),
        CONSTRAINT PK_AccountsToDelete PRIMARY KEY (AccountId)
    );
END

-- Step 1: Truncate the staging table
TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.AccountsToDelete;

/**IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.AccountsToDelete)
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dbo.AccountsToDelete (AccountId, Source)
    SELECT TOP (4) AccountId, Source
    FROM dbo.AllAccountsToDelete
    WHERE IsDeleted = 0 AND Source = 'Large'
    ORDER BY ACV;
END;**/

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM dbo.AccountsToDelete)
BEGIN
    INSERT INTO dbo.AccountsToDelete (AccountId, Source)
    SELECT TOP (50) AccountId, Source
    FROM dbo.AllAccountsToDelete
    WHERE IsDeleted = 0 AND Source = 'Medium'
    ORDER BY ACV;
END;

-- Step 1: Truncate the table
TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.AccountsToDelete;

-- Step 2: Define the list of Account IDs and the Source

INSERT INTO dbo.AccountsToDelete (AccountId, Source)
SELECT v.AccountId, 'Medium Accounts' AS Source  -- Change Source to 'Small', 'Medium' or 'Large' if needed
FROM (
    VALUES 
 (23698),
(22660),
(22521)
) AS v(AccountId);

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[AccountsToDelete]') AND type in (N'U'))
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE dbo.AccountsToDelete (
        AccountId INT NOT NULL,
        Source VARCHAR(50) NULL,  
        DateInserted DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(),
        CONSTRAINT PK_AccountsToDelete PRIMARY KEY (AccountId)
    );
END

TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.AccountsToDelete;
INSERT INTO dbo.AccountsToDelete (AccountId, Source)
SELECT DISTINCT ai.id,
       CASE 
           WHEN sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2 THEN 'Non-BH'
           ELSE 'Inactive BH'
       END AS Source
FROM dbo.AccountInfo ai
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = ai.id
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    )
    OR
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND ai.id NOT IN (23382)
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

DELETE ad
FROM dbo.ABADosageAssessment ad
JOIN dbo.childprofile cp ON ad.ChildProfileId = cp.id
JOIN dbo.accountinfo ai ON cp.accountInfoId = ai.id
JOIN dbo.subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = ai.id
JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON ai.id = atd.AccountId

/*WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2

        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND ai.id NOT IN (23382) -- Exclude known test account
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );
*/

INNER JOIN dbo.ABADosageAssessment aa ON t.AssessmentId = aa.id

/*DELETE t
FROM dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecordingDetails t
INNER JOIN dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecording bp ON t.behaviorPlanDataId = bp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );*/


DECLARE @BatchSize INT = 50000;
DECLARE @DeletedRows INT = 1;

WHILE @DeletedRows > 0
BEGIN
    ;WITH ToDelete AS (
        SELECT TOP (@BatchSize) t.Id
        FROM dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecordingDetails t
        INNER JOIN dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecording bp ON t.behaviorPlanDataId = bp.id
        INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
        INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
        INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
        INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
        /**WHERE 
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )**/
    )
    DELETE t
    FROM dbo.BehaviorPlanDataRecordingDetails t
    INNER JOIN ToDelete td ON t.Id = td.Id;

    SET @DeletedRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

    IF @DeletedRows < @BatchSize
        BREAK;
END

DELETE t
FROM dbo.FileCabinetEmailView t
INNER JOIN dbo.FileCabinetFiles cf ON t.FileCabinetFileId = cf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.FileCabinet fc ON cf.Filecabinetid = fc.id
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON fc.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON fc.MemberId = m.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountFileTagToFile afttf ON afttf.FileId = cf.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountFileTag aft ON aft.Id = afttf.AccountFileTagId

    a.ID = fc.accountInfoId OR a.ID = cp.accountInfoId OR a.ID = m.accountInfoId OR a.ID = aft.AccountId
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
/**WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
***/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LearningProcessAttributes t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.BehaviorTracking b
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = b.ChildProfileID
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE b.LearningProcessAttributesId = t.ID
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.AccountInfo a
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE a.LearningProcessAttributesId = t.ID
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cc.childProfileid
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE cc.LearningProcessAttributesId = t.ID
);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.Lesson t
WHERE t.ID IN (
    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = t.SubscriptionId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonAccountCustomCategory cc ON cc.LessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON cc.AccountId = atd.AccountId

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonCustomCategory cc ON cc.LessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cc.ClientId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonNote n ON n.lessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = n.childProfileId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.hcFormResponseLessonsExcluded hfrle
    WHERE hfrle.LessonId = t.id
)
AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.LessonCustomCategory lcc
    WHERE lcc.LessonId = t.id
);

    SELECT t.id 
    FROM dbo.Lesson t

            )

    UNION

    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID

    SELECT t.id

    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cc.ClientId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId

        (

            )

    UNION

    SELECT t.id
    FROM dbo.Lesson t
    JOIN dbo.LessonNote n ON n.lessonId = t.id
    JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = n.childProfileId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE 
        (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )

)

DELETE t

WHERE

        s.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            s.OrganizationTypeId = 2

DELETE t

INNER JOIN dbo.Lesson l ON t.LessonId = l.id
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = l.SubscriptionId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        s.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            s.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND s.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND s.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

/**
DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonTarget t
JOIN dbo.Lesson l ON t.LessonId = l.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = l.SubscriptionId
LEFT JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
LEFT JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        l.SubscriptionId IS NULL
        OR (
            atd.AccountId IS NOT NULL
            AND (
                s.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
                OR (
                    s.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                    AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                    AND s.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                    AND s.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
                )
            )
        )
    );

*/

DELETE t
FROM dbo.LessonTarget t
INNER JOIN dbo.Lesson l ON t.LessonId = l.id
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription s ON s.id = l.SubscriptionId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON s.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
INNER JOIN dbo.Targets trg on trg.id=t.TargetId
WHERE 
    (
        l.SubscriptionId IS NULL
        OR (
            atd.AccountId IS NOT NULL
            AND (
                s.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
                OR (
                    s.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                    AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                    AND s.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                    AND s.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
                )
            )
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.MFAUnsubscribedMembers t
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = t.memberId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );

DELETE t
FROM dbo.TeachingStep t
JOIN dbo.LearningProcessAttributes lp ON t.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id

INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a1 ON a1.LearningProcessAttributesId = lp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub1 ON sub1.accountInfoID = a1.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd1 ON a1.ID = atd1.AccountId

INNER JOIN dbo.CurrentCurriculum cc ON t.LearningProcessAttributesId = cc.LearningProcessAttributesId
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON cc.childprofileid = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a2 ON cp.accountInfoId = a2.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub2 ON sub2.accountInfoID = a2.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd2 ON a2.ID = atd2.AccountId

WHERE 
    (
        (
            a1.ID IS NOT NULL AND atd1.AccountId IS NOT NULL AND
            (
                sub1.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
                OR (
                    sub1.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                    AND a1.ID NOT IN (23382)
                    AND sub1.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                    AND sub1.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
                )
            )
        )
        OR
        (
            a2.ID IS NOT NULL AND atd2.AccountId IS NOT NULL AND
            (
                sub2.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
                OR (
                    sub2.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                    AND a2.ID NOT IN (23382)
                    AND sub2.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                    AND sub2.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
                )
            )
        )
    );

/*
DELETE t
FROM dbo.TrialSetSelections t
JOIN dbo.TrialSet ts ON ts.id = t.TrialSetId
LEFT JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ts.hollowchildprofileid = cp.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.ChildProfileLessonTarget c ON ts.childProfileLessonTargetId = c.id
LEFT JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON ts.MemberID = m.ID
LEFT JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    cp.accountInfoId = a.ID OR

JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID

DELETE t
FROM hcAddress t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcStaffMember s
    JOIN tblMember m ON m.ID = s.tblMemberId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = m.accountInfoId
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE s.AddressId = t.id
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcFunder f
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = f.accountInfoId
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE f.AddressId = t.id
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcChildProfileContacts cpc
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpc.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE cpc.AddressId = t.id
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcChildProfileScheduleAssessment cpsa
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpsa.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE cpsa.AddressId = t.id
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcProviderLocation pl
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON pl.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE pl.AddressId = t.id
);

/*DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcAppointments t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.clientId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE
    (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    );
*/

DECLARE @BatchSize INT = 50000;
DECLARE @DeletedRows INT = 1;

WHILE @DeletedRows > 0
BEGIN
    ;WITH ToDelete AS (
        SELECT TOP (@BatchSize) t.AppointmentId
        FROM dbo.hcAppointments t
        INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.clientId = cp.id
        INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
        INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    )
    DELETE t
    FROM dbo.hcAppointments t
    INNER JOIN ToDelete td ON t.AppointmentId = td.AppointmentId;

    SET @DeletedRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

    IF @DeletedRows < @BatchSize
        BREAK;
END

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcavailabilities t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.hcStaffMember hs
    JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = hs.tblmemberId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE t.entityid = hs.id AND t.entitytypeid = 1
      AND (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.ChildProfile cp
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE t.entityid = cp.id AND t.entitytypeid = 2
      AND (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )
);

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcElementField t
JOIN dbo.hcElementType et ON et.id = t.hcElementTypeId
INNER JOIN dbo.hcFormField ff ON ff.hcElementFieldId = t.id
INNER JOIN dbo.hcForm f ON f.id = ff.hcFormId
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON 
    et.accountInfoId = a.ID OR 
    f.accountInfoId = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
   /** (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )
    )
    AND 
    **/
    (et.isdefault = 0 OR et.accountInfoId IS NOT NULL);  -- Avoid removing shared global fields

DELETE t
FROM dbo.hcNote t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT t.Id
    FROM dbo.hcNote t
    INNER JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = t.clientid
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    /**WHERE 
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )**/

    UNION

    SELECT t.Id
    FROM dbo.hcNote t
    INNER JOIN hcStaffMember s ON s.id = t.staffId
    INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember tm ON tm.id = s.tblMemberId
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON tm.accountInfoId = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    /***WHERE 
        sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
        OR (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
            AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
            AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
            AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
        )***/
) toDelete ON t.Id = toDelete.Id;

DELETE t
FROM hcPermissionsAccessLevels t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcRolePermissions p
    JOIN dbo.AccountRole r ON r.id = p.roleId
    JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON r.accountInfoId = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.Subscription sub ON sub.accountInfoID = a.ID
    JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
    WHERE 
        p.hcPermissionsAccessLevelId = t.id
        AND (
            sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
            OR (
                sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
                AND a.ID NOT IN (23382)
                AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
                AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
            )
        )
);

INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.ID = atd.AccountId
WHERE 
    sub.OrganizationTypeId <> 2
    OR (
        sub.OrganizationTypeId = 2
        AND a.ID NOT IN (23382) -- exclude test account
        AND sub.SubscriptionStatusID <> 1
        AND sub.dateSubscriptionStatusChanged <= DATEADD(MONTH, -6, GETDATE())
    );

scripts.text:
-- Create the history table if it doesn't already exist
IF NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM sys.tables WHERE name = 'DeletedAccountsHistory'
)
BEGIN
    CREATE TABLE dbo.DeletedAccountsHistory (
        AccountId INT,
        DateDeleted DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(),
        CONSTRAINT PK_DeletedAccountsHistory PRIMARY KEY (AccountId)
    );
END

-- Insert new account deletions that haven't been logged yet
INSERT INTO dbo.DeletedAccountsHistory (AccountId, DateDeleted)
SELECT AccountId, GETDATE()
FROM dbo.AccountsToDelete atd
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM dbo.DeletedAccountsHistory h
    WHERE h.AccountId = atd.AccountId
);

UPDATE a
SET a.IsDeleted = 1,
    a.DateDeleted = GETDATE()
FROM dbo.AllAccountsToDelete a
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountsToDelete atd ON a.AccountId = atd.AccountId;

	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)

	END
	ELSE IF @TableName = 'AppointmentSandataInfo'

		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(rptId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('SessionScheduleLesson')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(sessionScheduleId INT,lessonId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('StaffMemberSandataInfo')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(MemberId INT,MedicaidId nvarchar(100))')

	ELSE IF @TableName IN('ScheduledReportAdditionalParameters')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ScheduledReportId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('ChildProfileClinicalSettings')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ChildProfileId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('rptTargets','rptObjectives')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(rptId INT)')
	END
	ELSE IF @TableName IN('RecapProfiles')
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ChildProfileId INT,MemberId INT)')
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)
		EXEC ('CREATE TABLE Temp_' + @TableName + '(ID INT)')
	END

	SET @Count = @Count + 1
END


End

SELECT @TotalCount = COUNT(1) FROM #TEMP

WHILE @Count <= @TotalCount
BEGIN
SET @TableName = NULL
	SELECT @TableName = TableName FROM #TEMP WHERE ID = @Count
	EXEC ('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS Temp_' + @TableName)

	SET @Count = @Count + 1
END


End

select t1.* from (select 
t.id
,t.Street1
,t.Street2
,t.City
,t.StateId
,t.Zip
,t.CountryId
,t.Town
,t.ModifiedBy
,t.DeletedBy
,t.CreatedBy
,t.DateDeleted
,t.DateLastModified
,t.DateCreated
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} t
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcStaffMember s
    JOIN tblMember m ON m.ID = s.tblMemberId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = m.accountInfoId
    WHERE s.AddressId = t.id
    and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcFunder f
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = f.accountInfoId
     WHERE f.AddressId = t.id
     and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) )
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcChildProfileContacts cpc
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpc.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    WHERE cpc.AddressId = t.id
    and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) )
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcChildProfileScheduleAssessment cpsa
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpsa.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    WHERE cpsa.AddressId = t.id
    and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) )
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM hcProviderLocation pl
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON pl.accountInfoId = a.ID
    WHERE pl.AddressId = t.id
    and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)
)t1
left join Temp_hcAddress t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
where t2.ID is null

inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =hs.tblmemberId    )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where entitytypeid=1
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) --and  ap.IsMigrated = 0

select --ap.*

      ,ap.storageId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	    
inner join dbo.tblmember tm on(tm.id= transactionBy  )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where referenceTypeId in (3,5,6,7)
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcTransaction t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select DISTINCT ap.id 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 	    
inner join dbo.tblmember tm on(tm.id= transactionBy  )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where referenceTypeId in (3,5,6,7)
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.Id
,ap.TypeId
,ap.StatusId
,ap.ReferenceId
,ap.CreatedDate
,ap.ExpirationDate
,ap.UpdatedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateLastModified
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.referenceId=ha.appointmentid ) 
            			        inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientId=p.id ) 
								inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})

)t1
left join Temp_hcWorkflowHistory t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.[name]
,ap.[description]
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (ap.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_hcemployeetype t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.accountInfoId
,ap.subscriberId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.parentId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hollowAccountInfoSubscriber t2 on t1.accountInfoId = t2.accountInfoId AND t1.subscriberId = t2.subscriberId
WHERE t2.accountInfoId IS NULL AND t2.subscriberId IS NULL
select accountInfoId,subscriberId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.accountInfoId
,ap.hollowSubscriberID
,ap.hollowCaregiverID
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.memberID
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hollowAccountLeaderRole6 t2 on t1.accountInfoId = t2.accountInfoId AND t1.memberID = t2.memberID
WHERE t2.accountInfoId IS NULL AND t2.memberID IS NULL
select accountInfoId,memberID from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.hollowSubscriberId
,ap.masteryPreference
,ap.[Value]
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.accountInfoId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join	dbo.hollowAccountInfoSubscriber hs on (ap.hollowsubscriberid=hs.subscriberId) 			
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hs.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hollowAccountMasteryCriteria t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select ap.id
,ap.firstName
,ap.lastName
,ap.homePhone
,ap.cellPhone
,ap.memberId
,ap.childRelationshipId
,ap.childRelationshipText
,ap.photoLocation
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.childRelationshipOrgId 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
--inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hollowCaregiver t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.*
ap.id
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.masteryPreference
,ap.[value]
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 							
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
)t1
left join Temp_hollowChildProfileLessonMasteryCriteria t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select   ap.childProfileId
,ap.lessonId
,ap.lessonStatusId
,ap.DateMastered
,ap.DateCreated

,ap.DateDeleted

)t1

scripts.text:
ALTER   PROCEDURE [dbo].[Usp_getsource_Count_Tables](
 @SourceDB       VARCHAR(100),
 @AccountInfoIDs VARCHAR(500))
AS
BEGIN

--CREATE TABLE TotalRecordCounts(ID INT IDENTITY(1,1),TableName Varchar(100),NoRows INT,SourceDB Varchar(100),AccountId INT,CreatedDate  DATETIME default GETDATE());


DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #TotalRecordCounts
CREATE TABLE #TotalRecordCounts(ID INT IDENTITY(1,1),TableName VARCHAR(100),NoRows INT,SourceDB VARCHAR(100),AccountId INT,CreatedDate  DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE());

--1.Subscription
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'Subscription' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id      
from Subscription S
inner join accountinfo a on (s.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,',')) 
GROUP BY a.id   


--2.tblMember
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'tblMember' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from tblMember t
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,',')) 
GROUP BY a.id   

--3.hcStaffMember
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'hcStaffMember' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from hcStaffMember h 
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (h.tblmemberid=t.id)
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,',')) 
GROUP BY a.id  

--4.ChildProfile
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'ChildProfile' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ChildProfile ap
inner join accountinfo a on (ap.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,',')) 
GROUP BY a.id  

--5.hcAppointments
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'hcAppointments' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from hcAppointments ap 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.clientId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,',')) 
GROUP BY a.id  


--6.SSOMetadata
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'SSOMetadata' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from auth.SSOMetadata aaa 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on  (aaa.accountId=a.ID ) 
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,',')) 
GROUP BY a.id  

--7.ActionTracking
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'ActionTracking' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ActionTracking aaa 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (aaa.AccountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--8.hcAvailabilities
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'hcAvailabilities' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from hcAvailabilities ap  
inner join dbo.hcStaffMember hs on ( ap.entityid=hs.id  )  
inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =hs.tblmemberId    )
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where entitytypeid=1
and a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  



--9.hcElementField
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'hcElementField' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ActionTracking aaa 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (aaa.AccountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  


--10.hcElementFieldValues
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'hcElementFieldValues' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from hcElementFieldValues efv
inner join hcElementField ef on efv.hcElementFieldId = ef.ID
inner join AccountInfo A on ef.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--11.hcElementType
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'hcElementType' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from hcElementType ap 
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where ap.accountinfoid is not null
and a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--12.hcForm
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'hcForm' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from hcForm ap 	
inner join  AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.AccountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--13.hcFormField
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'hcFormField' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from hcFormField ap 
inner join dbo.hcForm hf on (ap.hcFormId=hf.id)
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=hf.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--14.EmployeeBenefitEmailVerification
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'EmployeeBenefitEmailVerification' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from EmployeeBenefitEmailVerification ap 
 inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--15.ABADosageAssessment
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'ABADosageAssessment' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ABADosageAssessment ap  
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 			
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--16.ABADosageAssessmentResponses
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'ABADosageAssessmentResponses' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ABADosageAssessmentResponses ap 
inner join  dbo.ABADosageAssessmentAgreement ag on (ap.AssessmentId=ag.id  )
inner join dbo.ABADosageAssessment aa on ( ap.AssessmentId=aa.id) 
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (aa.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--17.AccountCoachingSessions
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'AccountCoachingSessions' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from AccountCoachingSessions ab 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (ab.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  


--18.AccountFileTag
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'AccountFileTag' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from AccountFileTag ap 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (ap.accountId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--19.AccountRole
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'AccountRole' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from AccountRole ap  
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--20.ActivityTests
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'ActivityTests' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ActivityTests ap 
inner join  dbo.CurrentActivity ac   on (ap.Currentactivityid=ac.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ac.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--21.ActivityTestSessionResponses
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'ActivityTestSessionResponses' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ActivityTestSessionResponses  ap 
inner join  dbo.ActivityTestSessions ats on (ap.ActivityTestsessionid=ats.id    )
inner join dbo.ActivityTests ah on (Activitytestid=ah.id)  
inner join dbo.CurrentActivity ac  on (ah.Currentactivityid=ac.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ac.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--print 'Test'
--22.ActivityTestSessions
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'ActivityTestSessions' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ActivityTestSessions ap 
inner join dbo.ActivityTests ah on (Activitytestid=ah.id)  
inner join dbo.CurrentActivity ac  on (ah.Currentactivityid=ac.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ac.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--23.Affiliate
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'Affiliate' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from Affiliate ap
 inner join dbo.tblMember t on (ap.memberid=t.id)
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--24.Answer
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'Answer' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from Answer an  
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (an.memberid=t.id   )
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--25.ApplicationLog
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'ApplicationLog' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from ApplicationLog an  
inner join dbo.tblMember t on (an.memberid=t.id   )
inner join accountinfo a on (t.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--26.AppointmentNonPropagationUpdates
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'AppointmentNonPropagationUpdates' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from AppointmentNonPropagationUpdates ap
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.AppointmentId=ha.AppointmentId )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )

--27.AppointmentSandataInfo
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'AppointmentSandataInfo' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from AppointmentSandataInfo ap 
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.AppointmentId=ha.AppointmentId )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  
--28.BehaviorPlan
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'BehaviorPlan' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from BehaviorPlan ap 	
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  
--29.BehaviorPlanFunction
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'BehaviorPlanFunction' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from BehaviorPlanFunction ap 
inner join dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.Behaviorplanid=bp.id   )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--30.BehaviorTracking
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'BehaviorTracking' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from BehaviorTracking  ap 	
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  


--31.BehaviorAssessment
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'BehaviorAssessment' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from BehaviorAssessment ap 
inner join	 dbo.BehaviorPlan bp on (ap.BehaviorPlanId= bp.Id  ) 	
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (bp.childProfileId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))

--32.BehaviorAssessmentLog
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
select 'BehaviorAssessmentLog' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id

inner join	dbo.BehaviorTracking bp on (ap.BehaviorTrackingid= bp.Id  )

where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))

--33.BehaviorAssessmentLogAbcOptions
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)

inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )

--34.BehaviorFormPlanFunction

--35.BehaviorFunctionSkills

inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))

--36.BehaviorNote

inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )		
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id  

--38.BehaviorPlanDataRecordingDetails

where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))

--39.BehaviorPlanMembers

inner join dbo.tblMember tm on (tm.id =ap.memberId    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ap.memberId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (tm.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))

--40.BehaviorPlanNotes

select 'BehaviorPlanNotes' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id

----LearningProcessAttributes	172

INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)
SELECT  TableName,SUM(RecordsCount),a.id AccountId
FROM (
select 'LearningProcessAttributes' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from LearningProcessAttributes LPA
Inner Join dbo.BehaviorTracking b on (b.LearningProcessAttributesId=LPA.ID )
Inner Join ChildProfile C ON C.ID = B.ChildProfileID
inner join AccountInfo A on C.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
Group by A.ID
union
select 'LearningProcessAttributes' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
 from LearningProcessAttributes LPA
inner join AccountInfo A on A.LearningProcessAttributesId = LPA.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
Group by A.ID
union
select 'LearningProcessAttributes' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
 from LearningProcessAttributes LPA
Inner join CurrentCurriculum CC ON LPA.ID = CC.LearningProcessAttributesId
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (CC.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join AccountInfo A on p.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
Group by A.ID)A
Group by TableName,a.id

INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName,NoRows,AccountId)

where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP by A.ID
union
select 'MasteryCriteria' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from MasteryCriteria MC 
inner join LearningProcessAttributes LPA on (LPA.Id= MC.LearningProcessAttributesId)
inner join AccountInfo A on A.LearningProcessAttributesId = LPA.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP by A.ID
--and mc.Ismigrated=0
union
select 'MasteryCriteria' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id 
from MasteryCriteria MC 
inner join LearningProcessAttributes LPA on (LPA.Id= MC.LearningProcessAttributesId)
Inner join CurrentCurriculum CC ON LPA.ID = CC.LearningProcessAttributesId
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (CC.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join AccountInfo A on p.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))GROUP by A.ID
)A
Group by TableName,a.id

----217.TeachingStep
INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName, NoRows,AccountId)
SELECT  TableName,SUM(RecordsCount),a.id AccountId
FROM (
 select 'TeachingStep' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from TeachingStep ap 
inner join LearningProcessAttributes LPA on ( ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=lpa.id  )
inner join AccountInfo A on A.LearningProcessAttributesId = LPA.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
Group by A.ID
union 
select 'TeachingStep' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from TeachingStep ap 
inner join  LearningProcessAttributes LPA on ( ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=lpa.id  )
Inner join CurrentCurriculum CC ON LPA.ID = CC.LearningProcessAttributesId
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (CC.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join AccountInfo A on p.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
Group by A.ID

union 
select 'TeachingStep' TableName,COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from TeachingStep ap 
inner join  LearningProcessAttributes LPA on ( ap.LearningProcessAttributesid=lpa.id  )Inner Join dbo.BehaviorTracking b on (b.LearningProcessAttributesId=LPA.ID )
Inner Join ChildProfile C ON C.ID = B.ChildProfileID
inner join AccountInfo A on C.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
Group by A.ID
)A
Group by TableName,a.id

--GROUP BY a.id  

INSERT INTO #TotalRecordCounts (TableName, NoRows,AccountId)
SELECT 'hcAddress'TableName,sum(RecordsCount) as RecordsCount,id FROM (
SELECT COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from hcAddress t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT a.ID,s.AddressId
    FROM hcStaffMember s
    JOIN tblMember m ON m.ID = s.tblMemberId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = m.accountInfoId
    WHERE a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
) A ON t.id = a.AddressId
GROUP BY a.id
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from hcAddress t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT a.ID,F.AddressId
    FROM hcFunder f
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = f.accountInfoId
    WHERE a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
) A ON t.id = a.AddressId
GROUP BY a.id
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from hcAddress t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT a.ID,cpc.AddressId
    FROM hcChildProfileContacts cpc
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpc.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    WHERE a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
   ) A ON t.id = a.AddressId
GROUP BY a.id
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from hcAddress t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT a.ID,cpsa.AddressId
    FROM hcChildProfileScheduleAssessment cpsa
    JOIN ChildProfile cp ON cp.id = cpsa.childProfileId
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON a.ID = cp.accountInfoId
    WHERE a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
    ) A ON t.id = a.AddressId
GROUP BY a.id
UNION ALL
SELECT COUNT(1) RecordsCount,a.id
from hcAddress t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT a.ID,pl.AddressId
    FROM hcProviderLocation pl
    JOIN AccountInfo a ON pl.accountInfoId = a.ID
    WHERE a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
    ) A ON t.id = a.AddressId
GROUP BY a.id
) v GROUP BY --v.TableName,
v.id

from dbo.hcPerson ap 
inner join dbo.hcChildProfileContacts tm on (tm.personid =ap.id    )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (tm.ChildProfileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id

FROM dbo.FileCabinet t
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON t.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.tblMember m ON t.MemberId = m.ID
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON t.accountInfoId = a.ID OR cp.accountInfoId = a.ID OR m.accountInfoId = a.ID
where a.Id in (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(@AccountInfoIDs,','))
GROUP BY a.id

sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select 
ap.rptId
,ap.ChildProfileId
,ap.LessonId
,ap.inCurrentPlan
,ap.IepGoalId
,ap.Iepgoal_DateDeleted
,ap.IepObjectiveId
,ap.Seq
,ap.ObjectiveText
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.DateMastered
,ap.masteryValue
,ap.ObjectiveType
,ap.ChildAccountInfoId
,ap.ChildAccountType
,ap.ChildL3AccountId
,ap.ChildL2AccountId
,ap.ChildL1AccountId
,ap.MonthYear
,ap.Year
,ap.WeekYear
,ap.WeekFirstDay
,ap.DateMasteredMonthYear
,ap.DateMasteredYear
,ap.DateMasteredWeekYear
,ap.DateMasteredWeekFirstDay
,ap.DateMasteredChildAccountInfoId
,ap.DateMasteredChildAccountType
,ap.DateMasteredChildL3AccountId
,ap.DateMasteredChildL2AccountId
,ap.DateMasteredChildL1AccountId
,ap.consecutiveDays
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
 inner join dbo.ChildProfile c  on (ap.childprofileid=c.id)
 inner join accountinfo a on (c.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_rptObjectives t2 on t1.rptId = t2.rptId
WHERE t2.rptId IS NULL
select rptId from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

ap.rptId

from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap
INNER JOIN dbo.ChildProfile cp ON ap.childProfileId = cp.id
INNER JOIN dbo.AccountInfo a ON cp.accountInfoId = a.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
--and  ap.IsMigrated = 0
)t1

Where t2.rptId IS NULL

properties.description: Trigger to initiate the copy of data > 90 days from the FileAcessHistory Table from Prod to Dev, then delete the data after copying.
